Important Days.body: 1. World Soil Day: 5 Dec - “Healthy Soil for Healthy Cities.”
2. Human Rights Day: 10 Dec - “Human Rights are Everyday Essentials.”
3. National Consumer Rights Day: 24 Dec - “Efficient Speedy Disposal through Digital Justice.”
4. Good Governance Day: 25 Dec.
5. National Education Day: 11 Nov (birth of Maulana Abul Kalam Azad).
6. International Men’s Day: 19 Nov - “Celebrating Men and Boys.”
7. World Food Day: 16 Oct; Theme - “Hand in Hand for a Better Food and Better Future.”
8. United Nations Day: 24 Oct.
9. National Unity Day: 31 Oct (birth of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel).
10. World Ozone Day: 16 Sep; Theme - “From Science to Global Action.”
11. World Tourism Day: 27 Sep; Theme - “Tourism and Sustainable Transformation.”
12. World Environment Day: 5 Jun; Theme - “Beat Plastic Pollution.”
13. International Year of Women Farmers: 2026 by UN.
14. International Yoga Day: 21 Jun; Theme - “Yoga for One Earth One Health.” (Celebrated in Visakhapatnam)
15. World Heritage Day: 18 Apr; Theme - “Heritage Under Threat from Disaster and Conflict.”
16. World Earth Day: 22 Apr; Theme - “Our Power Our Planet.”
17. National Panchayati Raj Day: 24 Apr (commemorates the 1993 Panchayati Raj Act).
18. World Wildlife Day: 3 Mar; Theme - “Wildlife Conservation Finance: Investing in People and Planet.”
19. International Day of Forests: 21 Mar; Theme - “Forest and Food.”
20. World Water Day: 22 Mar; Theme - “Glacier Preservation.”
21. World Wetlands Day: 2 Feb; Theme - “Protecting Wetlands for a Common Future.”
